basic_details.job_title: OPTCL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Through GATE (Short Notice) - Apply Online for 60 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Odisha Power Transmission Corporation Limited (OPTCL), A Government of Odisha Undertaking
basic_details.department: Human Resource Development (HRD), Odisha Power Transmission Corporation Limited
basic_details.application_mode: To be notified; details available at www.optcl.co.in
basic_details.short_information: OPTCL is recruiting 60 Management Trainee (Electrical) posts through GATE-2026 score, with Electrical Engineering qualification; detailed notification including last date to be published shortly on www.optcl.co.in.

important_dates.publication of detailed notification: To be published shortly on www.optcl.co.in
important_dates.opening of online registration: To be notified in detailed notification
important_dates.last_date_to_apply: To be notified in detailed notification

age_limit.details: Odisha Power Transmission Corporation Limited (OPTCL), a State owned Power Utility in Odisha engaged in the business of Transmission of electricity, has officially released Advertisement No. MPPR-01/2026-27 dated 19/05/2026 for Recruitment of Management Trainee (Electrical) through GATE-2026. This is a short notification announcing 60 vacancies with category-wise breakup and stipend/pay scale details. The detailed notification containing complete eligibility conditions, educational qualification, pay scale, remuneration and other relevant details will be published on the official OPTCL website shortly. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full detailed notification before applying. | Download OPTCL Management Trainee (Electrical) Recruitment 2026 Short Notification PDF
age_limit.age_details: Knowledge of Odia language is essential (as per Government of Odisha guidelines)

qualification.education_qualification: To be notified in detailed notification (expected: B.E./B.Tech in Electrical Engineering from a recognized university/institute)
qualification.details: Complete eligibility criteria including educational qualification, experience (if any), nationality, age, and other conditions will be published in the detailed notification on www.optcl.co.in shortly. Based on the short advertisement, the following is known:

selection_process: Selection of Management Trainee (Electrical) will be based on GATE Score 2026 (Electrical Engineering paper). Candidates must have appeared in and obtained a valid GATE-2026 score in Electrical Engineering to be eligible for this recruitment. Further details on the selection process
and medical fitness requirements will be published in the detailed notification on www.optcl.co.in shortly.
Shortlisting of candidates will be done based on their valid GATE-2026 score in Electrical Engineering discipline. Further process details to be announced in the detailed notification.
Details of subsequent stages including document verification and medical fitness requirements to be notified in the detailed notification.
how_to_apply: The detailed notification with complete application instructions, application link, eligibility conditions, and last date will be published shortly on the official OPTCL website www.optcl.co.in. Candidates are strongly advised to visit the website regularly and read the detailed notification carefully before applying. Based on the short advertisement, application is expected to be in online mode only.
Apply Online at: www.optcl.co.in (Application link to be activated after publication of detailed notification)
important_instructions: This is a short notification only. Detailed notification containing complete eligibility conditions, educational qualification, pay scale, remuneration and other relevant details will be published on OPTCL website www.optcl.co.in shortly - do not apply based on this short advertisement alone. Selection is exclusively through GATE Score-2026 (Electrical Engineering paper). Candidates without a valid GATE-2026 EE score are not eligible. Knowledge of Odia language is essential as per Government of Odisha guidelines. Candidates must satisfy this requirement. The stipend during training period will be Rs. 50,000/- per month; pay scale after completion of training will be Rs. 56,100 – Rs. 1,77,500/- with DA and other allowances. OPTCL is a Government of Odisha Undertaking (CIN: U40102OR2004SGC007553) engaged in Transmission of electricity. The Management Trainee selected will be trained and inducted into the organization in Electrical Engineering discipline. Candidates are advised to keep checking www.optcl.co.in regularly for the detailed notification and application link.

faq.question: Q1. What is OPTCL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: OPTCL Management Trainee (Electrical) Recruitment 2026 is a recruitment drive by Odisha Power Transmission Corporation Limited under Advertisement No. MPPR-01/2026-27 dated 19 May 2026 to fill 60 Management Trainee positions through GATE-2026 score in Electrical Engineering.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in OPTCL Management Trainee 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 60 vacancies are available for Management Trainee (Electrical) posts distributed as UR-31, SC-10, ST-12, SEBC-7, with 20 seats reserved horizontally for Women candidates across all categories.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for OPTCL Management Trainee Electrical 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a valid GATE-2026 score in Electrical Engineering paper and possess knowledge of Odia language as per Government of Odisha guidelines. Complete eligibility including educational qualification and age limit will be published in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for OPTCL Management Trainee 2026?
faq.answer: Selection will be based exclusively on GATE Score-2026 (Electrical Engineering paper). Only candidates with valid GATE-2026 EE score are eligible. Further stages including document verification will be notified in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for OPTCL Management Trainee 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for application will be notified in the detailed notification which will be published shortly on the official OPTCL website optcl.co.in. Candidates should check the website regularly for updates.
